revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{座標一覧}} {{Catmore}} {{デフォルトソート:あきたろくくんさんしうさんかんのんれいしよう}} {{citation needed|あきたろくくんさんしうさんかんのんれいしよう}} {{translated page|ja|Category:秋田六郡三十三観音霊場|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:秋田六郡三十三観音霊場|version=79360200}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:秋田六郡三十三観音霊場]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Matsumineyama Worship Sites]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture in Akita Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kannon pilgrimage sites]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Temples in Akita prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]
